chapter_title.en: Chapter on Zihar (declaring one's Wife Unlawful Like a mother)

text: 4833 - وَ رَوَى حَمَّادٌ عَنِ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ ظَاهَرَ مِنِ اِمْرَأَتِهِ ثَلاَثَ مَرَّاتٍ فَقَالَ "يُكَفِّرُ ثَلاَثَ مَرَّاتٍ" قُلْتُ إِنْ وَاقَعَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُكَفِّرَ قَالَ "يَسْتَغْفِرُ اَللَّهَ وَ يُمْسِكُ حَتَّى يُكَفِّرَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4833 - Hammad narrated from Al-Halabi who said: I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man who declared ẓihar (a form of divorce by comparison) against his wife three times.
Imam (as) said: "He must offer expiation three times."
I asked: "What if he engages in intercourse with her before offering the expiation?"
Imam (as) replied: "He must seek Allah's (swt) forgiveness and abstain until he completes the expiation."
